$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.8 — patch: re-running the remote provision wizard no longer orphans peer reservations (the same site name reuses its awaiting-key reservation — one peer, not duplicates). Remote sites can now be deleted (awaiting-key deletes freely and frees the overlay IP; a live/adopted site needs a typed-name confirm). And provisioned-but-not-adopted routers appear in a "Pending setup" card on the Dashboard and a section on the Devices page — never counted in the fleet up/down tiles. No migration (schema unchanged). See the changelog.
